creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 148935
shar file with new port

This shar file adds devel/qtserialport. It is needed for the new version of lang/basic256 that makes extensive use of the Qt library.

I tried to follow the guidelines in other qt ports.

Tested in redports (with its current limitations):
https://redports.org/~fernape/20141102163207-54090-253876/qt5-qtserialport-5.2.1.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20141102163207-54090-253877/glib-2.36.3_4.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20141102163207-54090-253878/qt5-qtserialport-5.2.1.log

Attached is a poudriere's log for 10.0-RELEASE-amd64
